mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.reader_id as readerId, r.book_id as bookId, r.seat_id as seatId, r.reservation_date as startTime, r.status, r.expiry_date as endTime, b.title as bookTitle, s.seat_number as seatNumber, s.area as area FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.reader_id as readerId, r.book_id as bookId, r.seat_id as seatId, r.reservation_date as startTime, r.status, r.expiry_date as endTime, b.title as bookTitle, s.seat_number as seatNumber, s.area as area FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id

SELECT r.id, r.reader_id as readerId, r.book_id as bookId, r.seat_id as seatId, r.reservation_date as startTime, r.status, r.expiry_date as endTime, b.title as bookTitle, s.seat_number as seatNumber, s.area as area FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.reader_id = #{readerId}

SELECT r.id, r.reader_id as readerId, r.book_id as bookId, r.seat_id as seatId, r.reservation_date as startTime, r.status, r.expiry_date as endTime, b.title as bookTitle, s.seat_number as seatNumber, s.area as area FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.reader_id = (SELECT id FROM reader WHERE reader_id = #{readerId})

SELECT r.id, r.reader_id as readerId, r.book_id as bookId, r.seat_id as seatId, r.reservation_date as startTime, r.status, r.expiry_date as endTime, b.title as bookTitle, s.seat_number as seatNumber, s.area as area FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.book_id = #{bookId}

SELECT r.id, r.reader_id as readerId, r.book_id as bookId, r.seat_id as seatId, r.reservation_date as startTime, r.status, r.expiry_date as endTime, b.title as bookTitle, s.seat_number as seatNumber, s.area as area FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (reader_id, book_id, seat_id, reservation_date, status, expiry_date) VALUES (#{readerId}, #{bookId}, #{seatId}, #{reservationDate}, #{status}, #{expiryDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.reader_id as readerId, r.book_id as bookId, r.seat_id as seatId, r.reservation_date as startTime, r.status, r.expiry_date as endTime, b.title as bookTitle, s.seat_number as seatNumber, s.area as area FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.seat_id = #{seatId}

SELECT r.id, r.reader_id as readerId, r.book_id as bookId, r.seat_id as seatId, r.reservation_date as startTime, r.status, r.expiry_date as endTime, b.title as bookTitle, s.seat_number as seatNumber, s.area as area FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.status = 0 AND r.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND r.expiry_date < #{now}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE DATE(reservation_date) = CURDATE()
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM reservation GROUP BY status
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND status = 3 AND reservation_date >= #{since}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND status = #{status}
